title: knautia amplexicaulis
intro: Knautia amplexicaulis, also known as the cluster knautia or shepherd's needle, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its clusters of small, pink or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Knautia amplexicaulis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
